params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

params.SpellDescription: If it's night, it becomes day. Otherwise, it becomes night. Activate only as a sorcery.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: If it's night, it becomes day. Otherwise, it becomes night. Activate only as a sorcery.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever day becomes night or night becomes day, you gain 1 life. You may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.

params.Description: If it's neither day nor night, it becomes day as CARDNAME enters.
